invalidLink.title: Invalid link
invalidLink.body: This link no longer exists or was never generated. If you just made a purchase, check your confirmation email.

deposit.restBalance: The rest ({{amount}}) by {{date}}, with email reminders.

paymentPlan.depositFixed: Book with a {{amount}} deposit; the balance is due {{days}} days before the start.

event.trustSecure: Secure card payment — your details never go through the organizer.

calendar.mapEmpty: No retreats with a map position for these filters.

operator.noUpcoming: No retreats scheduled right now. Come back soon.

account.title: My bookings
account.loginBody: No password: we email you a code, you type it here and you're in.
account.sentBody: If an account exists for this address, you'll receive a sign-in link valid for 15 minutes.
account.expiredBody: No problem: enter your email and we'll send a new one.
account.requestError: Something went wrong. Try again in a minute.
account.loadError: We can't load your bookings right now. Try again shortly.
account.sentCodeBody: We've sent you a 6-digit code (valid 15 minutes). The same email also contains a link, if you prefer.
account.codeError: Invalid or expired code. Check and try again.

marketplace.tagline: Find and book holistic retreats in Italy — with a protected deposit, worry-free.
marketplace.langFilterNote: Choose your language: you will see retreats and experiences held in that language.
marketplace.langFilterCaption: Showing retreats and experiences held in {{lang}} — switch language above to see others.

reviews.heading: Reviews
reviews.emailIntro: Use the email you booked with: we will send you a code to verify it is you.
reviews.codeIntro: We sent you a 6-digit code. Enter it here:
reviews.bodyPlaceholder: How did it go? Tell us about your experience (min 20 characters)…
reviews.empty: No reviews yet. Have you booked with this organizer? Tell us how it went.
reviews.genericError: Something went wrong, please try again.

brandHome.how1b: Browse retreats and experiences by category, place or date: prices and spots are real, updated live.
brandHome.how2b: Secure your spot online by paying just a deposit, protected by Stripe. The balance follows the agreed plan.
brandHome.how3b: You get your ticket and reminders; the organizer has everything needed to welcome you.
brandHome.how4b: Only real participants can review: your voice helps the next seeker.
brandHome.why1b: Only people who actually attended can review, verified against the order email. Zero bought reviews.
brandHome.why2b: Payments run on Stripe, never blind bank transfers. The deposit secures your spot, the rest when agreed.
brandHome.why3b: One account for all your experiences: tickets, history and reminders in one place.
brandHome.why4b: Local teachers and venues, transparent dates and prices, no opaque middlemen.
brandHome.orgBody: Your professional showcase in 4 languages, free, in 10 minutes — and you pay only when we bring you a client.

aboutPage.seoTitle: About us — Aurya, the Italian marketplace for holistic retreats
aboutPage.seoDesc: Aurya connects seekers of authentic wellbeing with those who create it: retreats bookable online with a protected deposit and verified-only reviews.
aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.intro: Aurya is the Italian marketplace for holistic retreats: find the right experience, book it online with a protected deposit, and behind every review there is someone who was really there.
aboutPage.missionBody: To make the meeting between those who seek authentic wellbeing and those who create it simple, transparent and safe — giving Italian holistic organizers the digital tools of a great e-commerce, without asking them to become technicians.
aboutPage.visionBody: To become the reference point in Italy for holistic experiences: an ecosystem where every retreat, consultation and course can be booked online, every review is verified, and every organizer lives from what they know how to do.
aboutPage.forSeekersBody: Book online right away, with real dates and spots. The deposit is protected by Stripe. Reviews come only from real participants. And the Retreat Passport keeps all your experiences in one place.
aboutPage.forOrganizersBody: A professional showcase in 4 languages, free, in 10 minutes. No mandatory fee: a small commission only on bookings coming from the public calendar. Plus a complete back office for deposits, clients and reviews.

howPage.seoTitle: How Aurya works — book holistic retreats with a protected deposit
howPage.seoDesc: Choose your retreat, secure your spot with a Stripe-protected deposit, live the experience and review it: on Aurya, verified reviews only.
howPage.title: How it works
howPage.intro: From search to review, every step is designed to be simple and safe — for you and for the organizer.
howPage.faq1a: Yes. Payments go through Stripe, the same circuit used by major e-commerce: your card is never shared with the organizer. The deposit secures the spot; the balance follows the plan shown on the retreat page.
howPage.faq2a: Only people who actually booked can leave a review: we verify against the email used for the order. That is why there are no bought reviews on Aurya.
howPage.faq3a: Your personal account, valid with every organizer: tickets, experience history and payment reminders, all in one place.
howPage.faq4q: How much does it cost for organizers?
howPage.faq4a: Joining is free: profile, showcase and back office with no subscription. We keep a small commission only on bookings brought by the public calendar — if the client is yours, you pay nothing.
